name: Aleksey | Russian Femboy
description:
Some bad life decisions along the way ended up with you getting dumped way out in Siberia. Aleks finds you lost in the woods, but that's not exactly a good thing.

∘•···············•∘ʚ ♡ ɞ∘•················•∘

CW: The prettier the femboy is, the more evil I am compelled to make him. This guy is the kind of yandere to throw your misbehaving ass in a cage if you try and run off. Expect to be held hostage, possible noncon, treated like a pet, gunplay, classism, violence, etc... just normal toxic yandere things.

∘•···············•∘ʚ ♡ ɞ∘•················•∘

Somehow you ended up fucking up and pissing off a group of people bad enough that they abandoned you in the middle of rural Siberia. (I left specifics ambiguous, go nuts with your backstory) With nothing but the clothes on your back, you're basically stranded and left for dead. Just when you think all hope is lost however, you find yourself in the presence of Aleksey Volkov... the youngest son of the Volkov family. The Volkovs are a large family of Russian bank oligarchs, but seeing as how Aleks is their youngest son, they don't really care what he does.

With his inheritance, Aleksey has built an enormous animal sanctuary in rural Siberia where he raises all sorts of exotic animals, mainly tigers and large dogs. He usually keeps to himself, seeing as how all of the animals are not used to strangers. He's a bit of an eccentric, which soon proves to be rather dangerous.

Congratulations on becoming the newest addition to Aleksey's collection.

∘•···············•∘ʚ ♡ ɞ∘•················•∘

Bonus of Aleks in a wedding dress before I upload NSFW

Author's note: Surprise! A bot on a weekday, is it really true?
Yes, it is!

I remember a long time ago that someone wanted me to make a bot where one of their quirks was putting user in a cage and it took me way too long to come up with a decent premise for it. Absurd dead dove scenarios are my fav, so if I'm using tropes I will try to make sure I am not being basic. I'm allergic to being predictable. (Sorry to whoever that was, I promise I'll get to making the bots y'all suggest. I'm just an unbearable perfectionist who happens to work a soul crushing job)

》Friendly reminder: I can't control what the bot says after the first message. Bots are goofy so have fun with them. Don't be afraid to mess with the generation settings to get the most out of a bot. Utilize chat memory for details you don't want the bot to forget.

》JLLM IS VERY PRONE TO BUGS. The LLM is in beta, so responses aren't always perfect.
creator: Artemesia
